step1.title: Complete your profile

pricing.title: Plans that fit your needs
pricing.subtitle: Start for free and upgrade as you grow. All prices are in Canadian dollars.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about WealthPilot
faq.q1: Does WealthPilot replace a financial advisor?
faq.a1: No. WealthPilot is a decision support tool that complements advice from a licensed professional. It helps you better understand your financial situation and explore investment strategies, but does not replace a certified advisor.
faq.a2: Absolutely. Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We use Supabase with row-level security (RLS) policies to ensure only you can access your information. We never share your data with third parties.
faq.q3: How does the free plan work?
faq.a3: The free plan gives you access to a personalized dashboard, one recommended portfolio, 5 AI messages per day, and the risk profile questionnaire. It's enough to start exploring and understanding your financial situation.
faq.q4: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a4: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from the Subscription page. Your access to premium features will remain active until the end of your billing period. We also offer a 30-day money-back guarantee.
faq.a5: WealthPilot analyzes over 90 Canadian and international ETFs available on the TSX and NYSE markets. Recommendations are personalized based on your risk profile, goals, and tax situation (TFSA, RRSP, RESP).
faq.a6: WealthPilot is not a registered financial advisor with the AMF. We provide educational and decision-support tools. For regulated personalized financial advice, consult a licensed professional.

cta.title: Ready to take control of your finances?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of investors using WealthPilot to optimize their portfolio.

footer.description: WealthPilot is a decision support tool. It does not replace advice from a licensed professional.
footer.newsletterDesc: Receive our investment tips and updates.
footer.disclaimer: Important notice: WealthPilot is not a registered financial advisor with the Autorité des marchés financiers (AMF) of Quebec or any other regulatory body. The information and recommendations provided are for educational purposes only and do not constitute financial, tax, or legal advice. Consult a licensed professional before making any investment decision.
